allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines: if not line.strip\(\): continue try: d = json.loads\(line\) msg = d.get\('message',''\) or d.get\('data',{}\).get\('message',''\) if isinstance\(msg, dict\): content = msg.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = c.get\('text',''\) if 'QA' in text or 'missing' in text.lower\(\) or 'client' in text.lower\(\): print\(text[:500]\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")
